name: 2pk Large Open Front Stackable White Bins - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your kitchen, garage or any other area nicely organized with the 2-Pack of Large Open Front Stackable White Bins from Brightroom™. This pack of two white bins features an open front and a large size to give you ample space for detergent, shampoos, and other items. Made of plastic, this bin pack has a stackable design to help you save space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
